_notes: Nine source categories are defined in Pallavi's dictionary; four are observed in the mirror. Vendor Marketplace, API, and Work Order > Add PO returned zero counts and are omitted from the list. This may mean the mirror does not fully populate source, scheduled_ap_header_id, or company_user_type_id=16 as production Postgres does; worth confirming with DBRE before drawing conclusions.
Categories listed in the spec that are inherently untrackable (Vendor Profile UI, Dashboard UI, Duplicate/Use Previous, PO Template) are unchanged.
